title: Inception
overview: A skilled thief enters people's dreams to steal secrets and is offered a chance to erase his past by planting an idea.

title: Interstellar
overview: A team of explorers travels through a wormhole in space in an attempt to save humanity from a dying Earth.

title: The Matrix
overview: A hacker discovers that reality is a simulated world and joins a rebellion against intelligent machines.

title: The Dark Knight
overview: Batman faces the Joker, a criminal mastermind who spreads chaos across Gotham City.

title: Batman Begins
overview: Bruce Wayne trains to become Batman and fights corruption and fear in Gotham City.

title: Joker
overview: A failed comedian in Gotham City descends into madness and becomes a symbol of violent chaos.

title: Man of Steel
overview: An alien raised on Earth becomes Superman and must protect humanity from a threat from his home world.

title: Avengers
overview: A group of superheroes joins forces to stop a powerful enemy from conquering Earth.

title: Iron Man
overview: A billionaire engineer builds a high-tech armored suit and becomes a superhero.

title: Guardians of the Galaxy
overview: A group of misfits travels across space to protect a powerful orb from a dangerous villain.

title: Toy Story
overview: A cowboy doll feels threatened when a new space ranger toy becomes his owner's favorite.

title: Finding Nemo
overview: A clownfish crosses the ocean to find his missing son with help from a forgetful friend.

title: The Lion King
overview: A young lion prince flees his kingdom and must learn to accept his destiny.

title: Titanic
overview: A young aristocrat and a poor artist fall in love aboard a doomed ocean liner.

title: The Notebook
overview: A couple from different social backgrounds falls in love and faces years of separation and longing.

title: La La Land
overview: An aspiring actress and a jazz musician fall in love while chasing their dreams in Los Angeles.

title: The Godfather
overview: The aging patriarch of a powerful crime family transfers control of his empire to his reluctant son.

title: Goodfellas
overview: A young man grows up in the mob and experiences the glamour and danger of organized crime.

title: John Wick
overview: A retired assassin returns to the criminal underworld after a personal tragedy.

title: Mad Max Fury Road
overview: In a post-apocalyptic wasteland, rebels flee a tyrant in a high-speed battle for survival.

title: Batman
overview: A masked vigilante protects Gotham City from criminals while confronting fear corruption and chaos.
